name: writing-docs
description: Apply Diataxis modes and proven documentation craft — a technical-builder voice, runnable code samples, the conversion skeleton for READMEs and landing pages, standalone-README design, consolidation by rewriting (per-page audits, merge maps, aliases, link sweeps), honesty gates that test docs claims against the real package, findability rules, delegated-prose work orders, ship discipline, and a required triaged slop-cop prose-lint pass — when writing, revising, consolidating, or rebuilding project documentation, READMEs, tutorials, how-tos, reference, cheat sheets, or examples catalogs.
